task388_manual_attempts.label: q_bool_CastLike_to_Greater_q_8
task388_manual_attempts.rule_basis: On complete generator support GroupNormalization->uint8 q is 0 or 248, so bool(q) equals q>8.
task388_manual_attempts.reason: Greater propagates the truthful 1x10x30x30 shape; the authority CastLike target hides it.

task388_manual_attempts.label: idx_i8_CastLike_to_Cast
task388_manual_attempts.reason: Cast exposes the data-dependent runtime shape instead of preserving the CastLike target shape.

task388_manual_attempts.label: reduce_uint8_then_Greater
task388_manual_attempts.reason: The full background mask is also the second Where condition; eliminating its bool conversion leaves an invalid uint8 condition.
